backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing NFT management with access control, user profiles, address books, blob storage integration, and ORIGYN-compliant metadata handling including minting, burning, transfers, and provenance tracking.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining old data structures (oldProvenanceID, oldORIGYNMetadata) and a run function that maps the old nftStore to maintain backward compatibility during upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: fixing UserDashboard NFT collection display and verifying AdminDashboard mint flow with blob storage integration.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including hooks, pages, components, and styling, detailing forge-themed UI, NFT management, authentication flows, and 3D trophy room implementation.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Video.gif as favicon and social media preview image, including meta tags for theme color, Open Graph, and Twitter cards.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component managing authentication state, profile setup modal display logic, view navigation (home/admin/user/trophy), and automatic logout navigation with forge-themed background.
frontend/src/components/AddressBookModal: Modal dialog for managing address book entries with add/edit/delete operations, Principal ID validation, clipboard copy functionality, and optional selection callback for transfers/airdrops.
frontend/src/components/AmbientSound.tsx: Web Audio API component creating forge ambient sounds (metal clinks, heat hum, noise) with volume toggle, audio context initialization, and cleanup on unmount.
frontend/src/components/FireBackground.t: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer displaying 'Powered by T3kNo-Logic RWA Technology' with animated flame icon and backdrop blur styling.
Animated canvas component that renders a forge-themed background with particle systems (sparks and embers), molten metal flows, and configurable intensity levels (low/medium/high).
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main navigation header component with Internet Identity authentication, theme toggle, navigation buttons (home/admin/user/trophy), mobile menu support, and ambient sound controls.
frontend/src/components/ProfileEditModal: Modal dialog for editing user profile including display name, bio, forge theme selection, and profile image upload with file validation (10MB max, image types only).
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Initial profile setup modal that appears for new users, requiring only a display name to complete account initialization with error handling for account creation delays.
frontend/src/components/SVGBonsaiLayer.t: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/SVGForgeLayer.ts: SVG-based decorative overlay component with two variants (hero/subtle) featuring animated forge glows, molten metal streams, and anvil silhouettes using gradients and CSS animations.
frontend/src/components/TransparencyDash: Modal dashboard displaying NFT transaction history (mint/burn/transfer) with tabs for user-specific and all transactions (admin), sorted by timestamp with icons and badges for each transaction type.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for managing user login/logout state, creating auth clients with configurable options, and handling identity delegation with automatic persistence to local storage.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, NFT management, redemptions, transactions, and address book, with media asset caching and rehydration utilities for blob URLs.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Forge-themed design tokens for light/dark modes and keyframe animations for flicker, ember-float, gold-pulse, shimmer-wave, and other forge-inspired effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for NFT management (single/batch minting, transfers), leaderboard visibility toggle, and transaction history viewing with file upload support for artwork.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with video background, hero section showcasing Bonsai NFT collection, and feature cards explaining the redemption system with forge-themed animations and styling.
frontend/src/pages/TrophyRoom.tsx: 3D trophy room component using Three.js to display NFTs with interactive forge-themed visuals, particle effects, and Web Audio API sound effects for metallic clinks and ember pops.
frontend/src/pages/UserDashboard.tsx: User dashboard displaying NFT collection, redemption history, leaderboard, and profile management with modals for editing profile, address book, and transparency dashboard.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended theme utilities, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document indicating NFT minting platform with known issues around NFT persistence and collection display, with pending feature requests to fix storage and retrieval.
